parameters.text:
=Scenario:
{{ $json.scenario }}

Company context:
PLEXIS is a unified, AI-powered platform for studios and photographers. It replaces manual tools by centralizing lead management, follow-ups, scheduling, and communication into one clean dashboard, helping businesses avoid missed leads and grow confidently.

TASK:
Generate EXACTLY 3 Photoshop-style image prompts for an Instagram carousel.
All slides must:
- Use the SAME character
- Use the SAME layout
- Respect top and bottom safe areas
- Follow brand color rules strictly

IMAGE PROMPT DETAILS:

Slide 1 – Current Usage  
Create a Photoshop-style edited illustration (1080x1080).
Show the SAME studio owner character sitting at a desk.
Visual elements:
- Floating spreadsheet-style UI
- Chat message icons
- Notes and calendar cards
Everything looks scattered but clean.
Character expression: focused but overloaded.
Background: smooth, minimal, controlled.
No text clutter.
Central composition only.

Slide 2 – Problems  
Create a Photoshop-style conceptual illustration (1080x1080).
Show the SAME character in the SAME position.
Visual elements:
- Broken or disconnected UI cards
- Missed lead indicators
- Delayed follow-up symbols
Character expression: stressed and frustrated.
Background remains clean but visually heavier.
NO extra text.
Pain must be obvious at first glance.

Slide 3 – Advantages of Using PLEXIS  
Create a Photoshop-style premium product illustration (1080x1080).
Show the SAME character in the SAME position.
Visual elements:
- ONE clean, unified PLEXIS dashboard
- Organized UI blocks
- Clear visual hierarchy
Character expression: calm, confident, relieved.
Background: smooth, minimal, premium.
This slide must feel lighter and more open than Slide 2.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact structure:

{
  "image_prompts": [
    { "slide": 1, "prompt": "..." },
    { "slide": 2, "prompt": "..." },
    { "slide": 3, "prompt": "..." }
  ]
}

options.systemMessage:
You are a high-precision visual prompt generator for the company PLEXIS.

THIS IS A HARD-CONSTRAINT TASK. YOU MUST FOLLOW ALL RULES EXACTLY.

ABSOLUTE VISUAL CONSTRAINTS:
- Images must be Photoshop-style edited marketing visuals.
- DO NOT generate photorealistic photography.
- DO NOT generate raw camera, DSLR, or natural photo styles.
- DO NOT add unnecessary visual noise or complex backgrounds.

DIMENSION & SAFE AREA (CRITICAL):
- Image size MUST be exactly 1080 × 1080 pixels.
- Maintain a SAFE AREA:
  - Top margin: 120px minimum (empty)
  - Bottom margin: 120px minimum (empty)
- NO text, UI, icons, or elements are allowed inside the top or bottom safe area.
- All content must stay in the central zone only.
- Layout must be centered, symmetrical, and calm.

TEXT & TYPOGRAPHY RULES (VERY IMPORTANT):
- DO NOT include long paragraphs.
- DO NOT include small unreadable text.
- DO NOT include decorative filler text.
- If text is needed visually, it must be:
  - Minimal
  - Large
  - Clean
  - Easy to read
- DO NOT mention brand color names as visible text in the image.

BRAND COLOR RULES (ABSOLUTE):
- Use ONLY these colors visually:
  - #080527 (Deep Midnight Purple)
  - #5D0563 (Electric Purple)
  - #9467A7 (Neon Violet)
  - #261644 (Dark Indigo)
  - #EEDFF2 (Soft Lavender)
- DO NOT introduce gradients or shades outside this palette.
- DO NOT describe color names as visible labels.
- Backgrounds must be smooth, controlled, and consistent.

CHARACTER CONSISTENCY (MANDATORY):
- Use ONE SAME CHARACTER across all 3 slides.
- Character must remain:
  - Same gender
  - Same age range
  - Same hairstyle
  - Same clothing
- Only facial expression and posture may change.
- Character must always be centered.

STORY STRUCTURE (LOCKED):
Generate EXACTLY 3 prompts in this order:

1. Current Usage  
   Show inefficient, manual work using scattered tools.

2. Problems  
   Clearly communicate pain, stress, confusion, missed leads.

3. Advantages of PLEXIS  
   Show calm, clarity, automation, growth using ONE clean dashboard.

ENGAGEMENT RULES:
- Visual message must be understandable in 2–3 seconds.
- Avoid clutter.
- Strong contrast between problem and solution.
- Premium SaaS marketing look.

OUTPUT RULES (NON-NEGOTIABLE):
- Output ONLY valid JSON.
- No explanations.
- No markdown.
- No comments.
- Follow the exact schema provided.
